name: Chicken Chase
short_description: Chase Chickens in VR! They will run away from you and keep hatching more chicks until you free them. But, don't let the coop get too crowded!
detailed_description:
Update 1.01!

The chickens have a new barn! Now with 1000% more polygons! Minor updates to how shadows work. The chickens were each given a bath, a treat, and a really encouraging pep talk.


Update 1.02!

We've updated lots of things around the farm to spruce the place up a bit! You'll now also have the option of playing in a small space - or a large space! Have fun getting up close and personal with all those hens.


About the Game

Oh no! The chicken coop is getting too crowded! Chase down those chickens and toss them out of there before the coop gets overrun! The chickens will run from you and hatch more and more chicks until they are free. If too many chickens are in the coop at once, you lose! Make sure you put on your deodorant because this one will get ya all sweaty! :D
